element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Tutorial levels establish directional control and jump mechanics
Core puzzle mechanic; players learn to build platforms and destroy obstacles
Can be destroyed by jumping or fireballs; essential for spatial puzzle solving
Countdown timer creates pressure; enemies require avoidance or firepower
Acquired as item; used to destroy demons and blocks; expands tactical options
Constant threat; players must acquire key and reach exit before timer expires
Must acquire key before accessing door to next room; often hidden requiring puzzle solution

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Constellation seal triggers (found in level 4 of each zodiac group)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Optional secret levels; players must find seal items to unlock access; rewards exploration
Three seals unlock special levels: Page of Time, Page of Space, Princess Room
Enhance firepower; extend lives; unlock hidden rooms when acquired in specific ways

typical_relief_triggers: Acquiring key and reaching exit door
Reaching safe platform away from spawning enemies
typical_tension_triggers: Unlimited enemy spawning from fixed locations
Need to build/destroy blocks while enemies approach
Discovering key is in hazardous location
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating pressure: starts with simple puzzle-solving in early constellation levels; mid-game intensifies enemy density and timer urgency; late-game combines complex block mechanics with heavy enemy pressure; secret levels provide sudden difficulty spikes for completionists

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Sealed rooms in last level of each zodiac constellation group unlock when specific seal items are found; discovery requires exploration and optional puzzle solving
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Hidden seals appear as special items placed in non-obvious locations; collecting all three Seals of Solomon unlocks additional secret levels (Page of Time, Page of Space, Princess Room); hidden rooms reward thorough exploration and secondary objectives

difficulty_curve.early_game: Aries-Gemini: introduces mechanics in isolated safe environments; focuses on block creation/destruction and basic navigation; timer pressure is present but manageable; enemies are minimal threat
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Cancer-Libra: increases enemy spawn density; timer pressure becomes more aggressive; puzzles require multi-step block manipulation; players must balance puzzle-solving with evasion
difficulty_curve.late_game: Scorpio-Pisces: complex spatial puzzles combined with heavy enemy pressure; limited safe zones; timer urgency peaks; secret levels significantly harder than main path
notable_spikes: First sealed constellation room (early access to secrets creates difficulty jump)
Page of Time, Page of Space, Princess Room (special unlocked levels are markedly harder)
Solomon's Room (final level; culmination of all mechanics at peak difficulty)

notable_level_patterns.description: 12 groups of 4 levels each (48 main levels total), one per zodiac sign (Aries through Pisces). Each group has escalating difficulty within the zodiac, with the 4th level containing a hidden seal that unlocks the bonus room for that constellation.
Hidden constellation-specific bonus rooms accessible only by acquiring the corresponding seal from the 4th level of each zodiac group. Provides alternative progression path and replay incentive.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Aries Bonus Room (unlocked via Aries Seal)

notable_level_patterns.description: Three meta-levels (Page of Time, Page of Space, Princess Room) accessible only if player collects all three hidden Seals of Solomon during main progression. Significantly higher difficulty; alternate ending.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Page of Time, Page of Space, Princess Room

notable_level_patterns.description: Solomon's Room is the climactic final level, combining all previously learned mechanics at maximum difficulty and enemy pressure.
